title: Amtech F0730 6mm (1/4") Quick Change Adapter
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE: This 6mm (1/4") quick change adapter is made from high carbon steel
VERSATILE: With a 6mm (1/4") hex shank, this quick release adapter fits most standard corded and cordless power drills and is also suitable for screwdriver bits and accessories
NOTE: It has a maximum torque of 30NM and is not suitable for high torque combination drills or impact drivers!
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 1/4'' Quick Change Adapter See more

specifications_table.Included components: ‎1 x quick change adapter (1/4 inch hex shank)
